name: Bear Foot Bean Curd
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon cornstarch dissolved in 1 T water
1 scallion (sliced in thin diagonal strips), sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the tofu into 4 pieces and cut each piece into 4 triangles.
2. Soak the fungus in boiling water to cover for 5 minutes, then drain and remove the woody part.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a wok. Stir-fry the tofu until lightly browned. Transfer to a separate plate.
4. Heat another 2 tablespoons of oil in the wok. Add the pork and stir-fry until it changes color. Add the fungus.
5. Gently add the tofu back into the pork mixture. Add bamboo shoots, soy sauce, salt, and stock. Cook for 2 minutes until thoroughly heated.
6. Thicken the sauce with the dissolved cornstarch. Sprinkle scallion on top and cook for an additional minute.
